headline: 3 Market-Beating Stocks with Promising Prospects
summary: Companies that consistently increase their sales, margins, or returns on capital are usually rewarded with the best returns, and those that can do all three for years on end are almost always the legendary stocks that return 100 times your money.

headline: This ‘Very Attractive’ Chip Stock Has Taken a Hit. The Case for Buying Now.
summary: ASML stock is down 7% in the past month, which makes the chipmaking machinery company a bargain according to TD Cowen.
